mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon_category WHERE deleted = 0 AND store_id = #{storeId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT ct.*, cc.name AS category_name FROM coupon_template ct LEFT JOIN coupon_category cc ON cc.id = ct.category_id AND cc.deleted = 0 WHERE ct.deleted = 0 AND ct.store_id = #{storeId} AND ct.status = 1 ORDER BY ct.id DESC
SELECT * FROM coupon_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM coupon_template WHERE sale_product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_template(store_id, category_id, name, image_url, description, sale_product_id, purchase_valid_days, gift_valid_days, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{saleProductId}, #{purchaseValidDays}, #{giftValidDays}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_template SET store_id = #{storeId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description}, sale_product_id = #{saleProductId}, purchase_valid_days = #{purchaseValidDays}, gift_valid_days = #{giftValidDays}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE coupon_template SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_coupon(coupon_no, template_id, user_id, store_id, coupon_name, image_url, source_type, source_no, status, expire_time, used_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{couponNo}, #{templateId}, #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{couponName}, #{imageUrl}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceNo}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, #{usedTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_coupon WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT uc.*, u.nickname, u.phone FROM user_coupon uc LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = uc.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE ORDER BY uc.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_coupon uc WHERE
mapper.update: UPDATE user_coupon SET status = 'REDEEM_PENDING', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNUSED' AND expire_time > #{now} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user_coupon SET status = #{targetStatus}, used_time = #{usedTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user_coupon SET status = 'EXPIRED', update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 'UNUSED' AND expire_time <= #{now} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_redeem_request(user_coupon_id, user_id, status, remark, auditor_id, audit_remark, audit_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userCouponId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{auditorId}, #{auditRemark}, #{auditTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon_redeem_request WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_redeem_request SET status = #{status}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0
